---
title: "Malte Nalenz, PhD"
subtitle: "Lead Data Scientist — Time Series, Logistics & Machine Learning"
toc: false

about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/dr-malte-nalenz-7a5169124
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maltenlz
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:malte.nlz@gmail.com
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=c1svxKoAAAAJ&hl=d
---

I am a Lead Data Scientist working at the intersection of **time series forecasting**,
**logistics**, and **machine learning**, with a strong foundation in statistics (PhD).

I help organizations turn operational data into reliable forecasts, smarter
planning decisions, and production-grade ML systems.
## What I do

- **Forecasting & time series** — demand, capacity, and operational forecasting at scale
- **Logistics & operations** — optimization and decision-support systems
- **Machine learning** — from research prototypes to production deployments
- **Statistical consulting** — methodology, experimentation, and rigorous analysis

## Get in touch

If you're looking for help with a forecasting, ML, or statistics problem,
[reach out by email](mailto:malte.nlz@gmail.com).
